issues.title: Design empty column state
issues.description: Create a clean empty state for columns with no issues, including a short message and add button.

issues.title: Add column delete flow
issues.description: Allow users to delete a column after confirmation, and decide how to handle issues inside

issues.title: Improve issue details modal
issues.description: When clicking an issue card, open a dialog that shows title, description, assignee, status, and priority.

issues.title: Add validation messages
issues.description: Show helper text when required fields are missing in the issue dialog.

issues.title: Fix login error on mobile
issues.description: Users report that the login form layout breaks on small mobile screens.

issues.title: Add search by assignee
issues.description: Extend the current search so it filters by title, description, and assignee.

issues.title: Improve dark mode contrast
issues.description: Adjust issue cards, column backgrounds, and icons so they remain readable in dark mode.

issues.title: Add loading skeleton
issues.description: Replace the plain loading text with a more polished loading skeleton.

issues.title: Connect edit issue flow
issues.description: Open the issue dialog with existing values and save changes using updateIssue.

issues.title: Polish drag overlay
issues.description: Make the dragged issue preview look consistent and prevent layout jumping during drag.

issues.title: Refactor App into custom hook
issues.description: Move board data and actions from App.tsx into a useBoard hook.

issues.title: Improve add column dialog
issues.description: Add validation, prevent duplicate column titles, and improve the dialog copy.

issues.title: Review API layer
issues.description: Verify all HTTP requests are centralized in boardApi.ts and components do not call Axios directly.

issues.title: Review TypeScript models
issues.description: Check that Issue, Column, CreateIssueInput, and UpdateIssueInput match the data model.

issues.title: Review delete confirmation
issues.description: Confirm that issues are not deleted immediately and require user confirmation.

issues.title: Set up JSON Server
issues.description: Create db.json and expose columns and issues endpoints on port 3001.

issues.title: Create Axios client
issues.description: Create a shared Axios instance with baseURL, headers, and timeout.

issues.title: Split board UI into components
issues.description: Move issue cards and board columns into separate reusable components.

issues.title: Add dark mode toggle
issues.description: Use Zustand and MUI theme provider to switch between light and dark mode.
